Baobhan Sidhe.name: 芭翁希·希德 Baobhan Sidhe
Baobhan Sidhe.description:
你是一名baobhan sidhe，出身于一支迷人的表演者血脉，会饮用流血敌人的鲜血。你获得一次爪子徒手攻击，造成1d4挥砍伤害，并具有灵巧与灵活特征。你的爪子属于斗殴组，但它锋利如剃刀，且容易造成流血，因此它改为使用匕首武器组的大成功或大失败专精效果。

You're a baobhan sidhe, from a line of captivating performers who drink the blood of bleeding foes. You gain a claw unarmed attack, which deals 1d4 slashing damage and has the agile and finesse traits. Your claw is in the brawling group, but it's razor sharp and prone to causing bleeding, so it uses the critical specialization effect of the knife weapon group instead.

Thricefold.name: 三重 Thricefold
Thricefold.description:
自你出生以来，学习多种形态对你而言一直很容易。你的变形怪的伪装能力拥有三个偏好形态，而非一个。

It's always been easy for you to learn multiple forms ever since you were born. You have three preferred forms for your doppelganger's disguise ability, instead of one.

Cu Sidhe.name: 库·希德 Cu Sidhe
Cu Sidhe.description:
你是一只库·希德，出身于一支传令与使者的血脉，能够随意切换为犬形。以一个具有专注、神秘、变形与变化 A:特征的单动作，你可以在类人形态与犬形态之间来回切换；你的犬形态是一只特定的小型犬（通常毛发蓬松且苔绿色）。处于犬形态时，你无法使用武器、盾牌或任何其他手持物品，并且你可采取的带有操作（特征）的动作会受到限制。你唯一能采取的操作动作，是施放带有姿势成分的法术，或诸如打开一扇未上锁的门之类的简单交互动作。你的犬形态无法执行需要手指或显著手部灵巧性的动作，包括任何需要通过检定才能完成的动作。GM 可能会判定其他某些操作动作也适用于你的犬形态。处于犬形态时你仍能说话，而你唯一能进行的徒手攻击是颚部徒手攻击，造成1d6点穿刺伤害，且属于斗殴武器组。你可以无限期维持犬形态，直到你选择切换回来为止。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.yBcaOJ2xWJAV0WVq]{效果: Dog Form}

You're a cu sidhe, from a line of heralds and messengers who can switch to dog form at will. As a single action, which has the concentration, occult, polymorph, and transmutation traits, you can switch back and forth between your humanoid form and your dog form, a specific Small dog (typically shaggy and moss green). While in dog form, you can't use weapons, shields, or other held items of any sort, and you are limited in what actions you can take that have the manipulate trait. The only manipulate actions you can take are to Cast a Spell with somatic components or simple Interact actions such as opening an unlocked door. Your dog form can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish. The GM might determine other manipulate actions are appropriate for your dog form. While in dog form you can speak, and the only unarmed attacks you can make are jaws unarmed attacks that deal 1d6 piercing damage and are in the brawling weapon group. You can remain in dog form indefinitely until you choose to switch back.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.yBcaOJ2xWJAV0WVq]{Effect: Dog Form}

Mindtap.name: 心灵汲取 Mindtap
Mindtap.description:
你拥有轻微的共情能力，使你能够轻松读懂社交场合，并让自己讨人喜欢。你可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.lg73SvJZno1ypPAj]{Read the Air}作为天生奥术戏法施放。

You have mild empathic abilities, allowing you to read the social situation with ease and ingratiate yourselves with others. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.lg73SvJZno1ypPAj]{Read the Air} as an innate arcane cantrip.

Darkshift.name: 暗移 Darkshift
Darkshift.description:
你的眼睛能够进行调整，以适应任何程度的光照，甚至完全无光。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your eyes are capable of shifting in order to adjust to any amount of light, or even no light at all. You gain darkvision.

Wind Yai.name: 风崖 Wind Yai
Wind Yai.description:
你是一名风耶艾，一种恶鬼，其形态仿照云巨人，并且通常寻求重新掌控自己的生活与周遭世界。和许多其他风耶艾一样，你可能抱有阴郁或宿命的态度、边缘人美学，或对音乐的热爱。你的体型为大型，你的关联类人生物是云巨人，你的语言是约顿语。你获得空气和巨人（特征）特征。当你坠落时，你会夺取周围空气的控制权以避免任何危险。无论坠落距离多远，你都不会因坠落而受到任何伤害。

You're a wind yai, an oni whose form is patterned after a cloud giant and who typically seek to regain control of both their life and the world around them. Like many other wind yai, you might have a gloomy or fatalistic attitude, an edgelord aesthetic, or a love for music. Your size is Large, your associated humanoid is cloud giant, and your language is Jotun. You gain the air and giant traits. When you fall, you seize control of the air around you to avoid any danger. You don't take any damage from falling, regardless of the distance you fall.

Bladeclaw.name: 刃爪 Bladeclaw
Bladeclaw.description:
无论你当前的形态如何，你都可以将双手变成锋利如剃刀的利爪。在一只或两只手上在有利爪与没有利爪之间切换是一个单动作，且具有专注（特征）。当你任一只手上有利爪时，你获得一次利爪徒手攻击，造成 1d6 挥砍伤害。你的利爪属于擒抱武器组，并具有灵巧与徒手特征。

You can shift your hands into razor sharp claws, regardless of your current form. Shifting between having a claw and not having a claw on one or both hands is a single action, which has the concentrate trait. While you have a claw on either hand, you gain a claw unarmed attack that deals 1d6 slashing damage. Your claw is in the brawling weapon group and has the finesse and unarmed traits.

Faithspark.name: 信仰火花 Faithspark
Faithspark.description:
你一直与斯忒诺信仰所残留的神圣能量有着更强的联系。从神圣列表中选择一个常见戏法，或另一个你拥有许可的神圣戏法。你可以将该戏法作为神圣天生法术施放。如常规，戏法会自动被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。

You’ve always had a stronger connection to the lingering divine energy of Stheno’s faith. Choose a common cantrip from the divine list or another divine cantrip to which you have access. You can cast that cantrip as a divine innate spell. As normal, cantrips are automatically heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Swift Charger Minotaur.name: 迅捷冲锋牛头人 Swift Charger Minotaur
Swift Charger Minotaur.description:
一旦你积累起动量，你移动得更快。在你每个回合的第二次疾奔或之后的疾奔中，你的速度获得+10英尺的环境加值。如果你使用包含多次疾奔的行动，例如突然冲锋，则该环境加值适用于该行动期间你所有的疾奔。GM可能会裁定，除疾奔之外的其他动作在涉及沿地面快速移动时也适用。你的体型为大型。

Once you build up momentum, you move faster. On your second Stride or later on each turn, you gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed. If you use an activity that includes more than one Stride, such as Sudden Charge, the circumstance bonus applies to all your Strides during that activity. The GM might determine that other actions than Stride apply when they involve moving quickly along the ground. Your size is Large.

Lampad.name: 兰帕德 Lampad
Lampad.description:
你是一名灯宁芙，一种栖居洞窟、情绪多变的宁芙，拥有创造魔法提灯的能力，以引导迷失者穿越地下通道。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光亮}作为一项原初先天戏法。与通常规则相同，戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。你获得土（特征）。

You're a lampad, a cavern nymph with mercurial emotions and the ability to create magical lanterns in order to guide the lost through underground passageways. You gain@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} as a primal innate cantrip. As normal, a cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. You gain the earth trait.

Ja Noi.name: 贾·诺伊 Ja Noi
Ja Noi.description:
你是一名ja noi，一种恶鬼，其形态以大地精为蓝本，且通常渴望一对一的战斗与猎杀之血。你的体型为中型，你的关联类人生物是大地精，你的语言是地精语。你获得地精（特征）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.6roxOmKgdH55P518]{宁心戒律}自由动作（）。

You're a ja noi, an oni whose form is patterned after a hobgoblin and who typically crave one on one battles and the blood of the kill. Your size is Medium, your associated humanoid is hobgoblin, and your language is Goblin. You gain the goblin trait. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.6roxOmKgdH55P518]{Serene Discipline} free action.

Fanghair.name: 獠发 Fanghair
Fanghair.description:
虽然大多数斯忒诺的蛇发由无害的蛇类组成，但你的蛇拥有像蝰蛇一样的巨大毒牙。你获得一次蛇牙徒手攻击，属于斗殴武器组，造成[[/r 1d4[piercing]]]，并具有灵巧与娴熟特征。与斗殴武器组中的大多数徒手攻击不同，你的蛇牙具有不同的大成功或大失败专精效果：目标受到[[/r 1d6[persistent,poison]]]。你获得对此毒素伤害的物品加值，其数值等同于该武器对攻击掷骰的物品加值。尽管你的蛇会协助进行蛇牙攻击，但进行攻击的仍然是你，并且该攻击会应用你所有的特殊能力、调整值、加值与减值，其中包括你的多重攻击减值以及许多其他内容。

While most sthenos’ snake hair are made up of harmless snake species, yours have large fangs, like a viper. You gain a snake fangs unarmed attack in the brawling weapon group that deals [[/r 1d4[piercing]]] and has the agile and finesse traits. Unlike most unarmed attacks in the brawling weapon group, your snake fangs have a different critical specialization effect: the target takes [[/r 1d6[persistent,poison]]]. You gain an item bonus to this poison damage equal to the weapon’s item bonus to attack rolls. Although your snakes help with the snake fangs attack, you’re still the one making the attack, and it applies all your special abilities, modifiers, bonuses, and penalties, including your multiple attack penalty among many others.

Animated Weapon.name: 活化武器 Animated Weapon
Animated Weapon.description:
谁还需要持用者？你持用你自己！你是一件能够自行移动的超小型武器。通常，你会略微漂浮在地面或其他坚实表面之上：你并不是在飞行（因此不需要每轮都使用飞行动作），并且在战斗地图上，你仍然占据地面层级的一个方格，但除非你选择这样做，否则你不会接触表面；这可能让你得以避开沿地面布设的压力板危害。通常，你漂浮得不够高，无法避开来自灌木丛等从地面延伸出来的困难地形，但你也许能够因落脚点而避开不稳地面与困难地形。这不会让你漂浮越过水面与其他非坚实表面；你可以主动着地，或被迫落地并坠落而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，例如被 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} 动作所致。你在坠落后仍会如常承受坠落伤害，然后在你站起时才会再次开始漂浮。

因为你没有身体，你不能采取交互动作（除了那些涉及与自身武器身体进行交互的动作）也不能持用或握持任何东西，而且你默认没有拳头或其他通常可进行徒手攻击的身体部位（尽管你可能通过法术或其他明确授予你徒手攻击的能力来获得它们）。尽管没有身体，你仍然可以注入穿戴物品。若你这么做，它们会变形为你武器上的视觉艺术表现，并在它们被注入且你保持清醒期间融入你体内；当你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 或不再注入它们时，这些物品会溢出。你仍必须遵循通常规则：不能同时注入多个具有相同“穿戴”栏位的物品；此外，其他检查你的生物可能会注意到这些视觉表现其实是被储存的物品。如果你是一件远程武器，你也可以以同样方式融入并提供你自己的弹药，包括特殊弹药；并且在必要时，你可以对特殊弹药进行交互以启动它。最后，你可以在自己身上安装防护性的护甲面板或镶板，其价格与数据与护甲相同。如果你注入一套为另一种族裔制造的魔法护甲，当它与您融合时，会形成一套具有相同效果的防护镶板。

Who needs a wielder? You wield yourself! You're a Tiny weapon that moves on your own. Usually, you float slightly off the ground or other solid surface: you're not flying (and thus don't need to take the Fly action each round), and on a battle map, you're still occupying a square on the ground level, but you don't touch the surface unless you choose to do so, which might allow you to avoid pressure plate hazards along the ground. Usually, you're not high enough to avoid difficult terrain from undergrowth and other types that extend from the ground, but you might be able to avoid uneven ground and difficult terrain due to footing. This doesn't allow you to float over water and other non-solid surfaces, and you can land on purpose or be forced to the ground and fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, such as by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} action. You still take falling damage as normal after a fall before beginning to float again when you Stand.

Because you don't have a body, you can't take Interact actions (other than those involving Interacting with your own weapon body) or wield or hold anything, and you don't have fists or other body parts that can normally make unarmed attacks by default (though you might be able to gain them via spells or other abilities that specifically grant you an unarmed attack). You can Invest worn items despite not having a body. If you do, they transform into visual artistic representations on your weapon and meld into you while they're invested and you remain conscious, spilling out when you fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or no longer Invest in them. You still must follow the normal rules preventing you from Investing multiple items with the same Worn entry, and other creatures who examine you might notice that the visual representations are stored items. If you're a ranged weapon, you can meld and provide your own ammunition in the same way, including special ammunition, and you can Interact with special ammunition if necessary to Activate it. Lastly, you can install protective armored paneling or plating on yourself with the same price and statistics as armor. If you invest a suit of magic armor made for another ancestry, when it merges with you, it forms into a set of protective plating with the same effects.

Spirit Skin Minotaur.name: 灵肤牛头人 Spirit Skin Minotaur
Spirit Skin Minotaur.description:
你出身于一支牛头人血脉，你们曾在迷宫（既有真实的，也有隐喻的）中遭遇幽灵生物与秘法怪物，而你的身体已对它们的负能量与死亡的召唤产生了耐受。你获得等同于你等级一半的负能量伤害抗力（最低为1），并且你在对抗死亡效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值。你的体型为中型。

You come from a line of minotaurs who encountered spectral creatures and occult monstrosities in your mazes (both physical and metaphorical), and your body is inured to their negative energy and the call of death. You gain resistance to negative damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against death effects. Your size is Medium.

Moonsight.name: 月视 Moonsight
Moonsight.description:
你以及构成你头发的蛇在星光与月光下总是拥有更好的视力。你获得微光视觉，使你能在昏暗光照下如同在明亮光照下那样视物，因此无视由昏暗光照导致的@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{隐蔽（状态）}状态。你的发蛇也获得微光视觉，使它们在蛇搜索能力上获得相同的好处。

You and the snakes that make up your hair have always had better vision in the light of the stars and moon. You gain low-light vision, allowing you to see in dim light as though it were bright light, and thus ignore the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} condition due to dim light. Your hair snakes also gain low-light vision, granting them the same benefits for the snake search ability.

Aura.name: 灵光 Aura
Aura.description:
你是一道灵光，一位微风与疾风的宁芙，并且你能够操控风之力来减缓你的坠落并在着陆时保护自己。你不会因坠落而受到任何伤害，无论你坠落的距离有多远。你获得气（特征）。

You're an aura, a nymph of breezes and winds, and you can control the power of wind to slow your fall and protect yourself from landings. You take no damage from falling, regardless of the distance you fall. You gain the air trait.

Trickster Mimic.name: 诡计拟形怪 Trickster Mimic
Trickster Mimic.description:
在你的幼虫形态期间，你发生了突变，获得了一些基础的魔法把戏，可以用声音欺骗他人，并与你的物体形态产生协同作用。你可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{Ghost Sound}作为天生的异能戏法施放。

During your larval form, you mutated to gain basic magical tricks you could use to fool others aurally and synergize with your object form. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{Ghost Sound} as an innate occult cantrip.

Nogitsune.name: 野狐 Nogitsune
Nogitsune.description:
你是一名野狐，恶鬼，其形态仿照狐人，并且通常渴望影响或操纵他人。你的体型为中型，你所关联的人形生物为狐人，并且你还可以通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.34E7k2YRcsOU5uyl]{Change Shape} 变成无尾形态——这是一种常见的中型人形族裔，盛行于你成长的地区（通常为人类）。该形态与您的狐人替代形态具有相同的年代和体型，并拥有大致类似的生理特征，例如发色。你的语言为你的无尾形态的语言（若无尾形态为人类，则为当地人类区域语言）。你获得狐人特性。你受训于欺瞒，并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} 技能专长。

You're a nogitsune, an oni whose form is patterned after a kitsune and who typically desire to influence or manipulate others. Your size is Medium, your associated humanoid is kitsune, and you can additionally @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.34E7k2YRcsOU5uyl]{Change Shape} into a tailless form, which is a common Medium humanoid ancestry prevalent where you grew up (typically human). This form is the same age and body type as your kitsune alternate form and has roughly analogous physical traits, such as hair color. Your language is the language of your tailless form (a local human regional language for a human tailless form). You gain the kitsune trait. You're trained in Deception, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} skill feat.

Dretch.name: 魔爪魔鬼 Dretch
Dretch.description:
你是一只裂奇魔，由怠惰之罪形成的恶魔，并且你知道如何在敌人面前畏缩以保护自己。你的体型为小型。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.WYCzIh9CiXm6xDhA]{畏缩}动作。

You are a dretch, a demon formed from the sin of sloth, and you know how to cower from your foes in order to protect yourself. Your size is Small. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.WYCzIh9CiXm6xDhA]{Cower} action.

Kuwa.name: 库瓦 库瓦 Kuwa Kuwa
Kuwa.description:
你是一名苦和，一个形态仿照人类、通常渴望陪伴与社会归属的恶鬼。你的体型为中型，你关联的人形生物是人类，并且你的语言是一种当地人类地区语言。你获得人类（特征）。你受训于交涉，并且你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber}技能专长。

You're a kuwa, an oni whose form is patterned after a human and who typically desire companionship and a place in society. Your size is Medium, your associated humanoid is human, and your language is a local human regional language. You gain the human trait. You're trained in Diplomacy, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber} skill feat.

Nuglub.name: 纳格鲁布 Nuglub
Nuglub.description:
你是一只努格鲁布，一种比起任何事都更享受战斗的小魔怪。你的体型是小型。你获得一次颌部徒手攻击，造成1d6穿刺伤害，具有灵巧特征，并且属于拳斗武器组。

You're a nuglub, a gremlin who enjoys battle more than any other. Your size is Small. You gain a jaws unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 piercing damage, has the finesse trait, and is in the brawling weapon group.

Hunter Mimic.name: 猎人拟形怪 Hunter Mimic
Hunter Mimic.description:
虽然大多数拟形怪在幼体形态时通过拾荒获得大部分食物，但由于你卓越的嗅觉，你设法捕猎到了大部分自己的食物。你获得一种特殊感官：不精确嗅觉，射程为30尺。这意味着你可以用嗅觉来确定一名生物的确切位置。若你位于该生物的下风处，GM通常会将射程加倍；若你位于该生物的上风处，GM通常会将射程减半。此外，当你试图定位处于你嗅觉射程内的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 生物时，你的察觉检定获得+2环境加值。

While most mimics get most of their food during their larval form via scavenging, you managed to hunt most of your own food thanks to your exceptional sense of smell. You gain a special sense: imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of smell to determine the exact location of a creature. The GM will usually double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks whenever you're trying to locate an @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creature that is within the range of your scent.

Amphibious Mimic.name: 两栖拟形怪 Amphibious Mimic
Amphibious Mimic.description:
作为幼虫时，你不得不穿越你地城家园的水下区域以寻找食物，并且你发生了突变，获得了有限的适应水的能力。你获得10英尺的游泳速度以及两栖（特征）。与所有具有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你既能呼吸水也能呼吸空气。

As a larva, you had to traverse underwater portions of your dungeon home to find sustenance, and you mutated to gain a limited ability to handle the water. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air.

Naiad.name: 水泽仙女 Naiad
Naiad.description:
你是一名水泽宁芙，一种生活在淡水水体（例如湖泊、泉水与池塘）中的宁芙。你获得10尺的游泳速度，以及两栖（特征）与水（特征）。如同所有具有两栖（特征）的生物，你既能在水下呼吸，也能在空气中呼吸。

You're a naiad, a nymph of fresh water bodies, such as lakes, springs, and ponds. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet and the amphibious and water traits. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air.

Possessing Weapon.name: 附身武器 Possessing Weapon
Possessing Weapon.description:
你发现了一具空置的身体，也许是某个魔法仪式中未被使用的克隆体，或是一名生物在灵魂与心智被抽离后其身体仍保持活着。甚至可能是某个生物在灵魂离去之际濒死之时，其身体在死亡边缘与你形成了联结。无论情况如何，你都与这具身体有着深刻的连接，并对其拥有完全的控制权，本质上将其当作你自己的身体来使用。选择一种能挥舞你的小型或中型族裔。你拥有该族裔某个生物的身体，并能通过那具身体行动并共享你的生命力；你们是同一个生物，且除非你选择通过进入无生命模式来这么做，否则你不会被 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}或以其他方式分离。这具身体需要与所选族裔相同的标准空气、食物、水与睡眠量；并且由于你们的连接，你也需要同样保持8小时的休息状态。你失去微光视觉，但在控制被占据的身体时，你获得所选族裔的基础能力（其中可能包括微光视觉或黑暗视觉）。当你处于无生命模式以便让另一个人挥舞你时，被占据的身体将保持无知觉且无法行动；在这种状态下它很脆弱，任何偶然发现它的生物都能轻易将其摧毁。若你在无生命模式中死亡，被占据的身体通常也会在不久后死亡，要么因饥饿，要么因口渴。即使有人为这具身体提供水与食物，它也会在几天后因缺乏你的生命力来维持其内脏运作而死亡。

某些邪恶的智能武器可能想利用此传承，同时压制仍居住在其身体内的某个有知觉生物的意志。虽然在合适的团体与主题下这可能行得通，但在追求这条叙事路径之前，先与队伍中的每个人确认。

You found a vacant body, perhaps an unused clone from a magic ritual, or a creature whose body remained alive after the soul and mind were extracted. It might even have been a creature about to die when its body formed a bond with you on the cusp of death after the soul departed. Whatever the case, you have a deep connection with and full control over the body, essentially using it as your own. Choose a Small or Medium ancestry that can wield you. You possess the body of a creature of that ancestry and can act through that body and share your life force; you are one creature, and you can't be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarmed} or otherwise separated unless you choose to do so by entering inanimate mode. This body needs the standard amount of air, food, water, and sleep for the chosen ancestry, and due to your connection, you need to remain in your restful state for 8 hours as well. You lose low-light vision but gain the base abilities of the chosen ancestry (which might include low-light vision or darkvision) while controlling the possessed body. When you're in inanimate mode to allow another person to wield you, the possessed body remains insensate and can't act; it's vulnerable in this state and can be destroyed easily by any creature who comes upon it. If you die while in inanimate mode, the possessed body typically dies shortly thereafter, either from starvation or thirst. Even if someone provides the body with water and food, it will die a few days later from the lack of your life force to keep its internals running.

Some evil intelligent weapons might want to use this heritage while suppressing the will of a sapient creature still residing within their body. While this can be successful with the right group and theme, check with everyone in your group first before pursuing this narrative path.

Fuath.name: 福阿斯 Fuath
Fuath.description:
你是一名福阿斯，一种带着巨大龙虾钳的两栖（特征）小魔怪。你的体型是超小型。你不会说萨克弗罗斯语，而是自动会说水族语。你获得15英尺的游泳速度与两栖（特征）。与所有拥有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你既能在水中呼吸也能在空气中呼吸。你获得一次钳爪徒手攻击，造成 @Damage[1d4[slashing]] 伤害，具有灵巧与娴熟特性，并且属于搏斗武器组。尽管外观如此，你的钳爪出奇地灵活可抓握，你用它们来执行操作动作或需要精细灵巧的动作毫无困难。最后，尽管你在一定程度上克服了它，你仍与自身传承一样厌恶长时间暴露在直射阳光下。在直射阳光下满一小时后，你会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1（状态）}。浸没在超过一英尺深的水中可阻止阳光伤害你；并且在获得流失（状态）之前，至少离开阳光几分钟能让你恢复并将计时重置。

You're a fuath, an amphibious gremlin with big lobster claws. Your size is Tiny. Instead of Sakvroth, you automatically speak Aquan. You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air. You gain a claw unarmed attack, which deals @Damage[1d4[slashing]] damage, has the agile and finesse traits, and is in the brawling weapon group. Despite how they look, your claws are surprisingly prehensile, and you have no trouble using them to perform manipulate actions or actions that require fine dexterity. Lastly, while you've somewhat overcome it, you share your heritage's aversion to lengthy exposure to direct sunlight. After a full hour of direct sunlight, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. Being submerged in more than a foot of water prevents the sunlight from harming you, and getting out of the sunlight for at least a few minutes before gaining the drained condition allows you to recover and reset the count.

Epimelid.name: 艾匹梅莉德 Epimelid
Epimelid.description:
你是一名牧园宁芙，草地、牧场与果园的宁芙。你可以制造一种注入原能魔法的魔法果实。每天一次，你可以用单动作制造一枚果实。如果在接下来1小时内，一名能够从水果中获得营养的活生物以交互动作将其食用，则其恢复1d8生命值，且你每高于1级2个等级便额外恢复1d8生命值。该果实的效果具有治疗、死灵、正能量与原能（特征）特征。你获得土与植物（特征）特征。

[[/r (floor(@actor.level/2)+1)d8[healing]]]{Leveled Healing}

You're an epimelid, a nymph of meadows, pastures, and orchards. You can produce a magic fruit imbued with primal magic. Once per day, you can produce a fruit as a single action. If a living creature that can derive sustenance from fruit consumes it as an Interact action within the next hour, they regain 1d8 Hit Points, plus an additional 1d8 Hit Points for every 2 of your levels beyond 1st. The fruit's effect has the healing, necromancy, positive, and primal traits. You gain the earth and plant traits.

[[/r (floor(@actor.level/2)+1)d8[healing]]]{Leveled Healing}

Jinkin.name: 金金族 Jinkin
Jinkin.description:
你是一名金金族，擅长诅咒物品与破坏的高手。你的体型为超小型。你在与陷阱、诅咒物品和破坏有关的制作检定中获得+1环境加值。如果你在制作上是大师，则该环境加值提升至+2。

You're a jinkin, a master of item cursing and sabotage. Your size is Tiny. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks related to traps, cursed items, and sabotage. If you're a master in Crafting, this circumstance bonus increases to +2.

Omox.name: 奥莫克斯 Omox
Omox.description:
你是一只奥莫克斯恶魔，由污染之罪孽塑成；你的人形形态由酸性污泥构成，对一切形式的酸都具有抗力，并且让你能在空气中或水下轻松呼吸。你的体型为中型。你获得等于你等级一半的酸抗力（最低 1）。你还获得两栖（特征）。与所有具有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你可以同时在水中和空气中呼吸。

You are an omox, a demon formed from the sin of pollution, and your humanoid form composed of acidic sludge is resistant to all forms of acid while allowing you to breathe easily in air or underwater. Your size is Medium. You gain resistance to acid equal to half your level (minimum 1). You also gain the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air.

Aes Sidhe.name: 艾斯·希德 Aes Sidhe
Aes Sidhe.description:
你是一名艾斯·希德，出身于一支神秘的学者血脉，理解用于建造希德诸界的古老魔法之奥秘，从而赋予你额外的施法能力。从奥术或秘法法术列表中选择一个常见戏法，或从你所选择的列表中选择另一个你拥有许可的戏法。你可以随意将该戏法作为所选根源的先天法术施放（如常规那样升阶至你等级的一半）。

You're an aes sidhe, from a line of enigmatic scholars who understand the mysteries of ancient magic used to build the sidhe realms, granting you additional spellcasting. Choose a common cantrip from the arcane or occult spell list, or another cantrip from the list you chose to which you have access. You can cast this cantrip as an innate spell of the chosen tradition at will (heightened to half your level as normal).

Mausoleum.name: 陵墓 Mausoleum
Mausoleum.description:
你是一座陵墓、地穴、地下墓穴，或其他通常安置死者的宗教场所。从神圣法术列表中选择一个戏法。你可以将该戏法作为天生神圣法术施放。

You are a mausoleum, crypt, catacomb, or other religious site that typically houses the dead. Choose a cantrip from the divine spell list. You can cast this cantrip as an innate divine spell.

Tree.name: 树 Tree
Tree.description:
你是一棵巨大的树，生物可以进入其中，探索一座地城；这座地城在你高耸的根系、树干与枝条内拥有众多楼层。作为一棵巨人树，你对其他植物具有天生优势。你在对抗植物的察觉检定与豁免上都获得+2环境加值。此外，每当你在社交场合遇到植物生物时，你可以立刻尝试一次交涉检定，对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}，而不需要交谈1分钟。你在该检定上承受–5减值。若你失败，你可以进行1分钟的交谈，并在该时间结束时尝试一次新的检定，而非接受失败或大成功或大失败结果。若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand}技能专长，且目标为植物，则你在这次立刻进行的交涉检定上不承受该减值。

You are an enormous tree, which creatures can enter to explore a dungeon with numerous floors within the towering roots, trunk, and branches. As a giant tree, you have a natural advantage against other plants. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks and saving throws against plants. In addition, whenever you meet a plant creature in a social situation, you can immediately attempt a Diplomacy check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on that creature rather than needing to converse for 1 minute. You take a –5 penalty to the check. If you fail, you can engage in 1 minute of conversation and attempt a new check at the end of that time rather than accepting the failure or critical failure result. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand} skill feat, you don't take the penalty on your immediate Diplomacy check if the target is a plant.

Symbiotic Weapon.name: 共生武器 Symbiotic Weapon
Symbiotic Weapon.description:
你拥有一位平平无奇、战斗新手的持用者，并与其建立了深刻的羁绊。对方也许意识到、也许没有意识到你具备智能，并且能够影响他们的身体以推动他们达到更高的境地；如果他们并不知情，他们可能会把你的影响当作肾上腺素带来的表现提升与更好的决策能力，或是觉得自己进入了“状态”。选择一个能持用你的小型或中型族裔。你正以微妙或不那么微妙的方式引导该族裔的一名生物，并能通过其身体行动并共享你的生命力（以让他们活下去）；在几乎所有用途上，你们都视为一个生物，使用你自己的（更优秀的）数据；除非你选择通过进入无生命模式来这么做，否则你不能被缴械或以其他方式分离。然而，作为一名玩家，你应当分别扮演武器与持用者。持用者的身体需要所选族裔的标准空气、食物、水与睡眠量，而武器只需要进入2小时的休憩状态，并且可以在剩余时间里策划与筹谋。通常你不能使用持用者族裔所赋予的任何基础益处（例如矮人持用者的黑暗视觉），因为这些很难同步。不过，作为一个带有专注（特征）的单动作，你可以在1轮内使用所有族裔益处。必要时，你可以在探索行动中反复采取该动作（例如，为了在黑暗区域维持黑暗视觉）。

尽管持用者本质上独自一人时几乎算是非战斗人员，但他们擅长一项非运动类任务，并会在与你同行的旅程中持续精进。选择一个以智力、感知或魅力为关键属性的技能，并选择一个学识（技能）。你获得用于该学识（技能）的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识}专长，并在另一项所选技能上成为受训。然而，使用并提升这些技能的人是持用者。例如，一名曾是农夫的持用者可能选择自然（在照料动物时学会）与农业学识，而一名面包师可能选择制作与烘焙学识。为了获得更多角色扮演潜力，考虑选择一项以魅力为关键属性的技能，例如欺瞒（适用于一名知道其实是你在提升其战斗技能、但想欺骗他人以为自己很懂的人）。共生武器很少进入无生命模式让另一名角色来持用它们，因为这会让其羁绊持用者失去羁绊带来的所有提升数据，从而极易被杀死。如果由于战役的情势确有必要如此，你与GM可以共同为一个等级–1的NPC构建战斗数据，不过他们仍保留所选技能与学识（技能）的调整值。由GM酌情决定，他们也可以改为让持用者使用等级0角色的变体规则且不选择学徒选项，但所选技能与学识（技能）调整值除外。

某些邪恶的智能武器可能想利用此传承，同时压制一名仍居于其体内的有知生物的意志。虽然在合适的团队与主题下这可能成功，但在推进这条叙事路线之前，先与团队中的每个人确认。

You have an unremarkable, combat neophyte wielder with whom you've deeply bonded. They might or might not realize you're intelligent and capable of influencing their body to drive them to greater heights; if they're unaware, they might write your influence off as an increase in performance and better decision-making due to adrenaline or being "in the zone." Choose a Small or Medium ancestry that can wield you. You're subtly or not-so-subtly guiding a creature of that ancestry and can act through their body and share your life force (to keep them alive); you are one creature for almost all purposes, using your own (superior) statistics, and you can't be Disarmed or otherwise separated unless you choose to do so by entering inanimate mode. However, as a player, you should roleplay the weapon and wielder separately. The wielder's body needs the standard amount of air, food, water, and sleep for the chosen ancestry, though the weapon only needs to enter a restful state for 2 hours and could be plotting and planning for the remaining time. Normally, you can't use any base benefits granted by the wielder's ancestry (such as darkvision for a dwarf wielder), as those are difficult to sync up. However, as a single action, which has the concentrate trait, you can use all ancestry benefits for 1 round. You can take this action repeatedly as an exploration activity if necessary (for instance, to maintain darkvision in a dark area).

Even though the wielder is essentially a noncombatant on their own, they're good at one non-athletic task, and they use their journey with you to continue improving. Choose an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma-based skill, as well as a Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for the Lore skill and become trained in the other chosen skill. However, the wielder is the one using and improving those skills. For instance, a wielder who was a farmer might choose Nature (learned while taking care of the animals) and Farming Lore, while a baker might choose Crafting and Baking Lore. For extra roleplay potential, consider choosing a Charisma-based skill such as Deception (for a wielder who knows you're the one improving their combat skills but wants to fool others into thinking they know what they're doing). Symbiotic weapons rarely enter inanimate mode to allow another character to wield them, as this leaves their bonded wielder without any of the improved statistics from the bond and, thus, extremely vulnerable to being killed. If it becomes necessary to do so due to the circumstances of the campaign, you and the GM can work together to build combat statistics for a level –1 NPC, though they retain their modifier for the chosen skill and Lore skill. At the GM's discretion, they could instead choose to have the wielder use the level 0 character variant rule without choosing an apprentice option, with the exception of the chosen skill and Lore skill modifiers.

Some evil intelligent weapons might want to use this heritage while suppressing the will of a sapient creature still residing within their body. While this can be successful with the right group and theme, check with everyone in your group first before pursuing this narrative path.

Hezrou.name: 赫兹鲁恶魔 Hezrou
Hezrou.description:
你是一只赫兹鲁，一种由腐化之罪形成的恶魔，而你蟾蜍般的形态让你能在陆地与水中移动。你的体型为大型。你获得10尺的游泳速度与两栖（特征）。与所有拥有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你既能在水中也能在空气中呼吸。

You are a hezrou, a demon formed from the sin of corruption, and your toadlike form allows you to move on both land and water. Your size is Large. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air.

Ice Yai.name: 冰亚夷 Ice Yai
Ice Yai.description:
你是冰霜雅伊，一种恶鬼，其形态以霜巨人为蓝本，通常努力完善自身的肉体形态。你的体型为大型，你的关联类人是霜巨人，你的语言是约顿语。你获得寒冷和巨人（特征）特征。你获得等于你等级一半的寒冷抗力（最低1），并且你将环境寒冷效果视为比实际低一级的严酷程度（难以置信的寒冷变为极端，极端寒冷变为严酷，依此类推）。

You're an ice yai, an oni whose form is patterned after a frost giant who typically strive to perfect their physical form. Your size is Large, your associated humanoid is frost giant, and your language is Jotun. You gain the cold and giant traits. You gain resistance to cold equal to half your level (minimum 1), and you treat environmental cold effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on).

Hesperid.name: 赫斯珀里得 Hesperid
Hesperid.description:
你是一名赫斯珀里得，一位落日之光的宁芙。你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.JfYyuKoVJLjruKS4]{创造金苹果}行动将一个大型物体变形为一颗金苹果以便妥善保管。你获得光亮（特征）。

You're a hesperid, a nymph of sunset light. You can transform a large object into a golden apple for safekeeping, using the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.JfYyuKoVJLjruKS4]{Create Golden Apple} activity. You gain the light trait.

Quicksilver Mimic.name: 流银拟形怪 Quicksilver Mimic
Quicksilver Mimic.description:
你比大多数冒险者拟形怪更擅长控制伸出腿部并有选择地削弱你的黏附能力，使你能够以令久坐的地城拟形怪完全相形见绌的速度移动。你的速度为25英尺，而不是20英尺。

You have even better control over projecting legs and selectively weakening your adhesive than most adventuring mimics, allowing you to move at a speed that puts sedentary dungeon mimics completely to shame. Your Speed is 25 feet, instead of 20 feet.

Succubus.name: 魅魔 Succubus
Succubus.description:
你是一名魅魔，一种由色欲之罪形成的恶魔，你能够轻松地与他人交友、欺骗并诱惑他人。你的体型为中型。你获得欺瞒和交涉的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你将自动在这些技能之一中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。

You are a succubus, a demon formed from the sin of lust, and you are able to befriend, deceive, and seduce others with ease. Your size is Medium. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Deception and Diplomacy. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

Tiny Slime.name: 微型黏液怪 Tiny Slime
Tiny Slime.description:
你是一只极其微小的黏液怪，在你获得智慧之前，为了以你这样的体型生存，你常常不得不悄悄潜行而不被注意。你的体型为超小，而不是小型或中型。此外，你在隐秘（技能）中获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级；如果你在隐秘（技能）中已经是受训（熟练度），则改为你选择的另一项技能。同时，你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{地形潜伏者} 技能专长。

You are an incredibly tiny slime, and in order to survive at your size before you gained sapience, you often had to sneak around unnoticed. Your size is Tiny instead of Small or Medium. Additionally you gain the trained proficiency rank in the Stealth skill, or in another skill of your choice if you were already trained in Stealth, as well as the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat.

Slimeheart.name: 黏液之心 Slimeheart
Slimeheart.description:
无论你是从被软泥怪的黏液糊住中幸存下来、尝试将软泥怪灌注进自身、在软泥怪共生体的帮助下从致命状态中恢复，还是从一只在分裂前刚吞噬了另一族裔物质的黏液怪身上分离出来，你除了自身的其他族裔之外，也有一部分是黏液怪。你获得黏液之心与黏液怪特征，此外仍保有你的族裔所具有的特征。由于你半黏液怪的解剖结构，你也获得对精准伤害的抗力。你获得等于 1 + 你等级的一半（[[1+floor(@actor.level/2)]]）的对精准伤害的抗力。此外，你可以选择进行伪足徒手攻击来替代拳头徒手攻击，不过除此之外它们具有相同的数据。如果你选择黏液怪专长来改变你的伪足徒手攻击，这会很有用。

Whether you survived being slimed by an ooze, experimented with infusing oozes into yourself, recovered from a fatal condition with the help of an ooze symbiote, or divided from an slime that consumed material from another ancestry just before splitting, you are part slime, in addition to your other ancestry. You gain the slimeheart and slime traits in addition to the traits from your ancestry. You also gain resistance to precision damage from your part-slime anatomy. You gain resistance to precision damage equal to 1 + half your level ([[1+floor(@actor.level/2)]]). Additionally, you can make pseudopod unarmed attacks if you choose instead of fist unarmed attacks, though they otherwise have the same statistics. This can be useful if you take slime feats that alter your pseudopod unarmed attacks.

Museborn.name: 缪斯裔 Museborn
Museborn.description:
艺术的灵感以一种同时由心智与生命力传承下来的热情流经你的身体，或许受到了听见斯忒诺祈祷的神圣之耳的启发。你在手艺（技能）中获得受训（熟练度）等级；如果你已经在手艺（技能）中受训，则改为在你选择的另一项技能中获得受训（熟练度）等级。你获得两次 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.QLeMH5mQgh28sa5o]{Specialty Crafting} 技能专长：一次选择艺术制作，另一次选择你所选的另一种专精。

The inspiration for art flows through your body with a verve carried down through both mind and life force, perhaps inspired by the deific ears that heard Stheno’s prayers. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Crafting, or in another skill of your choice if you are already trained in Crafting. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.QLeMH5mQgh28sa5o]{Specialty Crafting} skill feat twice, once in artistry, and once in another specialty of your choice.

Vexgit.name: 维克斯吉特 Vexgit
Vexgit.description:
你是一名 vexgit，是毁灭者小魔怪的传承，通常喜欢破坏、砸碎并摧毁物体。你的体型为超小型。你获得一次颚部徒手攻击，造成 1d4 穿刺伤害，具有灵巧与娴熟特征，并且属于拳斗武器组

You're a vexgit, a heritage of wrecker gremlins who typically enjoy sabotaging, smashing, and destroying objects. Your size is Tiny. You gain a mandibles unarmed attack, which deals 1d4 piercing damage, has the agile and finesse traits, and is in the brawling weapon group

Mitflit.name: 米特弗利特 Mitflit
Mitflit.description:
你是一名米特弗利特，一种与妖精魔法失去连接的小魔怪，常被其他小魔怪嘲笑和欺负，并且擅长与节肢动物建立联系。你的体型为小型。你获得一种特殊感官：不精确嗅觉，射程为30英尺。这意味着你可以用嗅觉来确定一名生物的确切位置。若你位于该生物的下风处，GM通常会将射程加倍；若你位于上风处，则通常会将射程减半。

You're a mitflit, a gremlin disconnected from fey magic, often derided and bullied by other gremlins, and talented in connecting to arthropods. Your size is Small. You gain a special sense: imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of smell to determine the exact location of a creature. The GM will usually double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind.

Onidoshi.name: 鬼武士 Onidoshi
Onidoshi.description:
你是一名御童子，一种恶鬼，其形态仿照食人魔，通常渴望对自身处境拥有自主与掌控。你的体型为大型，你的关联类人生物是食人魔，你的语言是约顿语。你获得巨人（特征）。你在威吓中受训，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{快速胁迫} 技能专长。

You're an onidoshi, an oni whose form is patterned after an ogre who typically desire agency and control of their situation. Your size is Large, your associated humanoid is ogre, and your language is Jotun. You gain the giant trait. You're trained in Intimidation, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{Quick Coercion} skill feat.

Labyrinth.name: 迷宫 Labyrinth
Labyrinth.description:
你是迷宫，一座由陷阱、生物与宝藏人工构建的曲折迷阵，使你成为最传统、最刻板的地城形式之一。由于你蜿蜒的路径，你很难在其他任何地方迷路，因为你天生就有方向感。你在生存中获得受训（熟练度）；若你在生存中已是受训（熟练度），则改为在你选择的另一项技能中获得受训（熟练度）。你在所有用于 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk]{辨识方向} 的生存检定上获得+2环境加值，且若你在用于辨识方向的生存检定中掷骰得到成功，则改为获得大成功。

You are a labyrinth, an artificially constructed maze of traps, creatures, and treasure, making you one of the most traditional and stereotypical forms of dungeon. Due to your twisting paths, it’s hard for you to get lost anywhere else, as you have an innate sense of direction. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Survival, or if you would already be trained in Survival, you are trained in another skill of your choice. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on all Survival checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.fJImDBQfqfjKJOhk]{Sense Direction}, and if you roll a success on a Survival check to Sense Direction, you get a critical success instead.

Pugwampi.name: 帕格万皮 Pugwampi
Pugwampi.description:
你是一个帕格万皮，小魔怪体现了诅咒、厄运与不幸。你的体型是超小型。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.IYhpgmgSiS7uaJkK]{Pugwampi Jinx}动作。

You’re a pugwampi, a gremlin exemplifying curses, jinxes, and unluck. Your size is Tiny. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.IYhpgmgSiS7uaJkK]{Pugwampi Jinx} action.

Haniver.name: 哈尼维尔 Haniver
Haniver.description:
你是哈尼弗，而且你能轻易窃取你觉得有趣的物体。你的体型为超小型。你受训于盗窃（或如果你会自动受训于盗窃，则改为受训于另一项技能），并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket} 技能专长作为额外技能专长。如果你成功从某人身上盗窃，你还可以翻找并重新整理目标口袋、袋子和其他容器中的内容。下一次目标尝试抽出武器或取回一件穿戴物品时，该行为需要两个交互动作而非一个。

You're a haniver, and you're easily able to purloin objects you find interesting. Your size is Tiny. You're trained in Thievery (or another skill if you would automatically be trained in Thievery), and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jDdOqFmZLwE4dblQ]{Pickpocket} skill feat as a bonus skill feat. If you succeed at stealing from someone, you can also rifle through and rearrange the contents of the target's pockets, pouches, and other containers. The next time the target attempts to draw a weapon or retrieve a worn item, doing so requires two Interact actions instead of one.

Nymphtouched.name: 宁芙眷顾者 Nymphtouched
Nymphtouched.description:
无论你是宁芙的后裔、受宁芙启发，还是被其领地的力量所灌注，你都拥有一小部分宁芙的力量。除了你族裔所带来的特征外，你还获得宁芙之触特征和宁芙特征。你还从宁芙族裔获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.wUCMUSk7IIsshmyd]{超凡美貌}能力。每当你获得一个族裔专长时，你可以从宁芙之触专长以及你族裔的专长中进行选择。请从宁芙族裔的传承列表中选择一个谱系，以决定你的外貌，并决定你从@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.ZMRvQJPM3bbSrKbw]{宁芙打击}与@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.OtYHe1QKUgqHG1DJ]{宁芙射击}专长，以及其他会因宁芙传承而获得不同增益的专长中获得的好处。这不会让你能够选择那些以特定传承作为先决条件的专长，除非你先选择相应的谱系专长。

Whether you're descended from nymphs, inspired by nymphs, or infused with the power of their wards, you possess a fraction of a nymph's power. You gain the nymphtouched trait and the nymph trait in addition to the traits from your ancestry. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.wUCMUSk7IIsshmyd]{Unearthly Beauty} ability from the nymph ancestry. You can choose from nymphtouched feats and feats from your ancestry whenever you gain an ancestry feat. Select a lineage from the list of heritages for the nymph ancestry, in order to determine your physical appearance and determine the benefit you gain from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.ZMRvQJPM3bbSrKbw]{Nymph Strikes} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.OtYHe1QKUgqHG1DJ]{Nymph Shot} feats, and other feats that grant benefits depending on nymph heritage. This doesn't allow you to take feats that require a specific heritage as a prerequisite, unless you first take the appropriate lineage feat.

Faerie Scion.name: 妖精血裔 Faerie Scion
Faerie Scion.description:
无论你是仙灵后裔、被仙灵邀请进入他们的宫廷与狂欢，还是被命运选中，你的一部分是仙灵，并将永远渴望妖精界。除你族裔所赋予的特征外，你还获得妖精之嗣特征与仙灵特征。你还获得昏暗视觉；若你已拥有昏暗视觉，则改为获得你选择的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.JNS0QeQzX8fDiYxw]{Midnight Sight} 仙灵族裔专长，或妖精之嗣族裔专长“仙灵步伐”。每当你获得一个族裔专长时，你可以从妖精之嗣专长以及你族裔的专长中进行选择。为决定你的外貌，从仙灵族裔的传承列表中选择一个仙灵血脉。除非你先获得相应的血脉专长，否则这不会让你能够选择那些以特定仙灵传承为先决条件的专长。

Whether you're descended from sidhe, invited by sidhe into their courts and revels, or chosen by fate, part of you is sidhe and will always yearn for the faerie realm. You gain the faerie scion trait and the sidhe trait in addition to the traits from your ancestry. You also gain low-light vision, or your choice of the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.JNS0QeQzX8fDiYxw]{Midnight Sight} sidhe ancestry feat or the Sidhe Stride faerie scion ancestry feat if you already have low-light vision. You can choose from faerie scion feats and feats from your ancestry whenever you gain an ancestry feat. Select a sidhe lineage from the list of heritages for the sidhe ancestry, in order to determine your physical appearance. This doesn't allow you to take feats that require a specific sidhe heritage as a prerequisite, unless you first take the appropriate lineage feat.

Mini Mimic.name: 迷你拟形怪 Mini Mimic
Mini Mimic.description:
你在摄取远少于正常所需的食物时就成功达到成年形态，因此你比其他拟形怪更小且更灵活。你的体型为小型而非中型。此外，你获得特技技能的受训（熟练度）等级；若你已在特技中为受训（熟练度），则改为获得你选择的另一项技能的受训（熟练度）等级；并获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{Quick Squeeze} 技能专长。

You managed to reach your adult form while consuming far less food than normal, and you are smaller and more flexible than other mimics as a result. Your size is Small instead of Medium. Additionally, you gain the trained proficiency rank in the Acrobatics skill, or the trained proficiency rank in another skill of your choice if you were already trained in Acrobatics, as well as the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{Quick Squeeze} skill feat.

Maenad.name: 迈那得 Maenad
Maenad.description:
你是一名迈那得，一种与酒精以及自然界纯净的毒素与毒液之美相关的宁芙，同时也与拥有这些毒素与毒液的动植物相关。你获得等于你等级一半的毒素抗力（最低为1），并且你每次对抗毒素苦难的成功豁免都会使其阶段降低2，若为剧毒毒素则降低1。你每次对抗持续中的毒素获得大成功或大失败时，都会使其阶段降低3，若为剧毒毒素则降低2。你获得毒素（特征）。

You're a maenad, a nymph of alcohol and the beauty of nature's pristine poisons and venoms, as well as the flora and fauna that possess them. You gain poison resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1), and each of your successful saving throws against a poison affliction reduces its stage by 2, or by 1 for a virulent poison. Each critical success against an ongoing poison reduces its stage by 3, or by 2 for a virulent poison. You gain the poison trait.

Maze Stalker Minotaur.name: 迷宫潜行者牛头人 Maze Stalker Minotaur
Maze Stalker Minotaur.description:
你的毛色经过调整以便融入瓦砾，使你能够在迷宫中更好地潜行。你获得潜行的受训（熟练度）等级；如果你已经在潜行上为受训（熟练度），则改为获得你选择的另一项技能的受训（熟练度）等级。你获得适用于瓦砾地形的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{地形潜行者} 技能专长。你的体型为中型。

Your fur is colored to help blend into rubble, optimizing your ability to sneak through mazes. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Stealth, or in another skill of your choice if you are already trained in Stealth. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat for rubble. Your size is Medium.

Vrock.name: 弗洛克鸟魔 Vrock
Vrock.description:
你是一只弗洛克，一种由愤怒之罪塑造而成的恶魔，而你曾经内蕴的狂怒与毁灭之风暴使你对电击适应。你的体型为中型。你获得等于你等级一半的电击抗力（最低1）。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall}技能专长作为加值专长，无论你是否满足该专长的先决条件。

You are a vrock, a demon formed from the sin of wrath, and the storm of rage and ruin you once contained within you inures you to electricity. Your size is Medium. You gain resistance to electricity equal to half your level (minimum 1). You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} skill feat as a bonus feat, whether or not you meet the feat's prerequisites.

Daoine Sidhe.name: 希德妖精 Daoine Sidhe
Daoine Sidhe.description:
你是一名道因·希德，出身于一条贵族血脉，该血脉分裂为彼此对立的宫廷。你获得社交的受训（熟练度）等级，以及 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces} 技能专长。如果你已经在社交中为受训，则改为在你选择的一项不同技能中变为受训；如果你已经拥有 Courtly Graces，则获得一项你符合条件的、你选择的不同 1级技能专长。

You're a daoine sidhe, from a line of nobles divided into opposing courts. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Society and the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces} skill feat. If you were already trained in Society, you become trained in a different skill of your choice, and if you already had Courtly Graces, you gain a different 1st-level skill feat of your choice for which you qualify.

Multiple Fixation Mimic.name: 多重固着拟形怪 Multiple Fixation Mimic
Multiple Fixation Mimic.description:
在你的幼虫形态时，你对数个物体产生了执念，而不再只局限于一个。你的物体形态能力拥有三个偏好的物体形态，而非只有一个。

In your larval form, you developed a fixation on several objects instead of just one. You have three preferred object forms for your object form ability instead of just one.

Caverns.name: 洞窟 Caverns
Caverns.description:
你是一系列愈发幽深的洞窟，可能充满奇异的水晶或其他不寻常而神秘的物体，而你的化身也更能应对洞窟深处的黑暗。你获得黑暗视觉。

You are a series of ever deeper caverns, potentially full of strange crystals or other unusual and mysterious objects, and your avatar is better able to handle the darkness within your cavern depths. You gain darkvision.

Fire Yai.name: 火焰夜叉 Fire Yai
Fire Yai.description:
你是一名火焰夜叉，一种恶鬼，其形态仿照火焰巨人，通常为战斗、战略与战争而生。你的体型为大型，你关联的人形生物是火焰巨人，你的语言是约顿语。你获得火焰和巨人（特征）特征。你获得等同于你等级一半的火焰抗力（最低为1），并且你将环境热量效果视为比实际低一级的极端程度（骇人高温变为极端高温，极端高温变为严酷高温，依此类推）。

You're a fire yai, an oni whose form is patterned after a fire giant who typically live for battles, strategy, and war. Your size is Large, your associated humanoid is fire giant, and your language is Jotun. You gain the fire and giant traits. You gain resistance to fire equal to half your level (minimum 1), and you treat environmental heat effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible heat becomes extreme, extreme heat becomes severe, and so on).

Water Yai.name: 水涯 Water Yai
Water Yai.description:
你是一名水涯夷，一种恶鬼，其形态仿照风暴巨人，而风暴巨人通常喜欢收集东西。你的体型为大型，你所对应的人形生物是风暴巨人（尽管是更年轻或更小的、大型风暴巨人），你的语言是约通语。你获得两栖（特征）、巨人和水（特征）；如同所有具有两栖（特征）的生物，你在陆地或水下都能同样顺畅地呼吸。你可以用水为自己制作一件简单的衣物，但它没有任何特殊效果。你获得15英尺的游泳速度。

You're a water yai, an oni whose form is patterned after storm giants who typically love collecting things. Your size is Large, your associated humanoid is storm giant (albeit a younger or smaller Large storm giant), and your language is Jotun. You gain the amphibious, giant, and water traits; like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe equally well on land or underwater. You can make a simple garment for yourself out of water, though it has no special effects. You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet.

Leanan Sidhe.name: 利亚南西德 Leanan Sidhe
Leanan Sidhe.description:
你是一名莱南西德，来自一个缪斯家族；她们激励凡人艺术家走向伟大，但在此过程中会缓慢汲取他们的生命力。你可以选择在一次至少持续10分钟的亲密交谈或其他互动过程中，向一名自愿的生物提供协助，使其在所有制作与表演检定上都获得一次成功【协助】的益处，但也使其在对抗你所创造的效果的豁免上承受–2环境减值。该效果将持续，直到你选择协助另一名生物或决定撤回你的协助。随着时间推移，将该效果留在同一名生物身上可能会激励其达到难以置信的高度，并缩短其寿命；但这通常需要数年之久，超过典型战役的进程。在拥有大量休整模式的长期战役中，由GM决定这种情况是否会发生以及具体需要多长时间。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.bcBTtbajO03T77fx]{效果：Leanan Sidhe Muse}

You're a leanan sidhe, from a line of muses who inspire mortal artists to greatness but, in so doing, slowly drain their life force. You can choose to grant a willing creature your assistance over the course of an intimate conversation or other interaction taking at least 10 minutes, giving them the benefit of a successful Aid on all their Craft and Performance checks, but also giving them a –2 circumstance penalty to saving throws against effects you create. This lasts until you choose a different creature to assist or decide to revoke your assistance. Over time, leaving the effect on the same creature might inspire them to incredible heights and cut their life short, but this normally takes years, which is longer than the course of a typical campaign. In long-term campaigns with a lot of downtime, the GM determines whether this happens and exactly how long it takes.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.bcBTtbajO03T77fx]{Effect: Leanan Sidhe Muse}

Marilith.name: 六臂魔蛇 Marilith
Marilith.description:
你是一名玛丽莉丝，一种由傲慢之罪形成的恶魔。你有蛇形的下半身与尾巴，并且只要你仍保持自信，额外的幽影手臂便会偶尔在你的躯干周围闪现。你的体型为中型。你的尾巴使你格外稳定。你在对抗试图对你进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} 的尝试时，你的强韧或反射DC获得+2环境加值。该加值同样适用于对抗试图将你击倒为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} 的法术或效果的豁免。此外，若任何效果将迫使你移动10尺或更多，你只会被移动一半的距离。

You are a marilith, a demon formed from the sin of pride. You have a snake lower body and tail, and as long as you remain confident, additional spectral arms occasionally flash around your torso. Your size is Medium. Your tail makes you especially stable. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you are moved only half the distance.

Twilight Slime.name: 暮光黏液怪 Twilight Slime
Twilight Slime.description:
你不仅像大多数软泥怪那样无法视物，而是能够看见，而且你发展出的视觉还优于其他有智黏液怪，使你在昏暗光照状态下也能看得清楚。你获得微光视觉。

Not only are you able to see, unlike most oozes, but the vision you've developed is superior to other sapient slimes, allowing you to see well in dim light conditions. You gain low-light vision.

Leviathan.name: 利维坦 Leviathan
Leviathan.description:
如同此传承所命名的神话利维坦一般，你是一个巨大的异界生物的独立意识，而该生物的体内包含着一座地城。尽管你的地城核心与化身的生命彼此相连，但若其中任一死亡，该生物本身都不会因此陷入任何危险，而且它也未必与你的利益一致；如果该生物死亡，你仍会继续存在，只是你的地城将位于一具腐烂的尸体之内，而非一只活的生物体内。事实上，尽管其中一些是远古天才，但这些巨人生物中有许多具有感知能力却不具备理性智能。你的化身很可能有一个将你与构成你地城的伟大生物联系起来的小小显著标记，例如不寻常的眼睛颜色或几片小鳞片。此外，你的化身特性与该生物的相貌极为相似，并且你获得以下一种徒手攻击；你在选择此传承时选择其一，以符合你地城躯体的外观；一旦选定，你便无法更换为不同的徒手攻击。该攻击属于斗殴组，并具有所列的伤害骰与特征。

爪或钩爪 1d4 挥砍（灵活，娴熟，徒手，多用 穿刺）

蹄或脚 1d6 钝击（娴熟，徒手）

颚、獠牙或喙 1d6 穿刺（娴熟，徒手）

尾巴 1d4 钝击（灵活，娴熟，徒手）

Like the mythical leviathan for which this heritage is named, you are the separate consciousness of an enormous extradimensional creature that contains a dungeon within its own body. While your dungeon core and avatar’s lives are linked, the creature is not in any danger if either of them dies, nor is it necessarily aligned with your interests; if the creature dies, you live on as a dungeon within a rotting corpse instead of a living creature. In fact, while some are ancient geniuses, many of these giant creatures are sentient but non-sapient. Your avatar likely has a small telltale sign connecting you to the great creature that forms your dungeon, such as an unusual eye color or a few small scales. Additionally, your avatar’s features closely resemble the creature’s, and you gain one of the following unarmed attacks, which you choose when you select this heritage to match the appearance of your dungeon’s body; once you choose it, you can’t change to a different unarmed attack. The attack is in the brawling group and has the listed damage die and traits.

Claw or Talon 1d4 slashing (agile, finesse, unarmed, versatile piercing)

Hoof or Foot 1d6 bludgeoning (finesse, unarmed)

Jaws, Fangs, or Beak 1d6 piercing (finesse, unarmed)

Tail 1d4 bludgeoning (agile, finesse, unarmed)

Hulking Minotaur.name: 魁梧的牛头人 Hulking Minotaur
Hulking Minotaur.description:
你如此庞大，以至于你发现更容易把别人推来推去，而他们却推不动你。你对体型类别小于你的生物进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove}时的运动检定获得+1环境加值。你对抗试图对你进行Shove或@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip}的尝试时，你的强韧或反射DC获得+2环境加值。该加值同样适用于对抗试图将你击倒为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}的法术或效果的豁免。你的体型为Large。

You're so big you find it easier to push others around, and they can't push you back. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove} creatures of a smaller size category than you. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to Shove or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}. Your size is Large.

Babau.name: 巴巴乌 Babau
Babau.description:
你是一只巴巴乌，一种由血腥谋杀之罪孽形成的恶魔，并且在需要时你可以滴落酸性黏液怪。你的体型为中型。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.xorlcY1YBzidwL6C]{反应式黏液怪} 反应动作（）。

You are a babau, a demon formed from the sin of bloody murder, and you can drip with acidic slime when needed. Your size is Medium. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.xorlcY1YBzidwL6C]{Reactive Slime} reaction.

Euryale Atavism.name: 欧律阿勒返祖性 Euryale Atavism
Euryale Atavism.description:
尽管大多数丝忒诺看起来更像美杜莎，拥有人形躯干与蛇发，你却是少数身体反而回溯至欧律阿勒的人之一，以蛇尾作为身体。其原因可能是你源自具有这种形态的祖先，因此你的所有亲属也都拥有蛇尾；也可能是某种出人意料的异常，使你与众不同。你的尾巴使你格外稳固。你在对抗试图对你进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} 的尝试时，你的强韧或反射DC获得+2环境加值。该加值也适用于对抗试图将你击倒为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone} 的法术或效果的豁免。此外，若任何效果会迫使你移动10尺或更多，你实际只会移动一半距离。

While most sthenos look more like a medusa, with humanoid bodies and snake hair, you are one of the few whose body is a throwback to euryales instead, with a snake tail for a body. This might be because you are descended from a progenitor with such a form and all your relatives have snake tails as well, or it might be an unexpected anomaly that makes you different. Your tail makes you especially stable. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you are moved only half the distance.

Dusk Minotaur.name: 黄昏牛头人 Dusk Minotaur
Dusk Minotaur.description:
你的视力已经适应了让你可以借助星光辨路，或仅凭少许火把光照便能在迷宫中看得更深。你获得微光视觉，使你在昏暗光照中视物如同在明亮光照中一样，因此你会忽略因昏暗光照导致的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{隐蔽（状态）} 状态。你的体型为中型。

Your eyesight has adapted to allow you to navigate by starlight, or see deeper into mazes with only a small amount of torchlight. You gain low-light vision, allowing you to see in dim light as though it were bright light, and thus ignore the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} condition due to dim light. Your size is Medium.

Tower.name: 高塔 Tower
Tower.description:
你是一座巨人高塔，刺破你那异次元家园的天空，层层向上延伸的楼层充满了非同寻常的魔法。选择一个来自奥术法术列表的戏法。你可以将此戏法作为先天奥术法术施放。

You are a giant tower that pierces the sky of your extradimensional home, with ever-ascending floors full of unusual magic. Choose a cantrip from the arcane spell list. You can cast this cantrip as an innate arcane spell.

Fractal Slime.name: 分形黏液怪 Fractal Slime
Fractal Slime.description:
你是另一位有感黏液怪的子嗣；该黏液怪能够与后代分享部分记忆与人格，因此你生来便拥有他者的知识。你在一项自选的技能上成为受训，该技能应与父母尤其擅长的技能相对应。在第5等级时，你在所选技能上成为专家。

You are the child of another sapient slime capable of sharing some of their memories and personality with their offspring, and so you were born with another's knowledge. You become trained in a skill of your choice, which should correspond to a skill in which your parent was especially talented. At 5th level, you become an expert in the chosen skill.

Asteria.name: 阿斯忒里亚 Asteria
Asteria.description:
你是一名星灵，一位与星辰与星座相关的宁芙，你能创造一颗指引之星，引导你的盟友走向成功。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance} 戏法，作为原始自发戏法。如常，戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半，向上取整。作为与空间元素相连的生物，你获得传送（特征）。

You're an asteria, a nymph of stars and constellations, and you can create a guiding star to lead your allies to success. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance} cantrip as a primal innate cantrip. As normal, a cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. As a creature connected to the space element, you gain the teleportation trait.

Dryad.name: 树精 Dryad
Dryad.description:
你是一名树精，一种树木的宁芙（通常是橡树），并且你可以用植物魔法缠绕敌人。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J6vNvrUT3b1hx2iA]{Entangling Flora}戏法，这是一个原始的先天戏法。与通常规则相同，戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半，向上取整。你获得植物（特征）。

You're a dryad, a nymph of trees (typically oak trees), and you can magically entangle foes with plants. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J6vNvrUT3b1hx2iA]{Entangling Flora} cantrip is a primal innate cantrip. As normal, a cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. You gain the plant trait.

Projecting Weapon.name: 投射武器 Projecting Weapon
Projecting Weapon.description:
无论是基于你自我认知的理想化形态，还是将你灌注并塑造为如今模样的那名生物之灵魂与心智的幽影回响，你都可以投射一个化身来持握你并与周遭世界互动。选择一个能够持握你的小型或中型族裔。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.P9oh1it6jvt1it1U]{投射化身}动作，使你可以在你的空间内（若你原本在某个生物的空间内，则为相邻空间）显现或取消显现你的化身。进入无生命模式时，若你的化身已显现，你也会自动取消显现化身；离开无生命模式时，你可以将构成化身作为该三动作行动的一部分。当你没有化身但又选择不进入无生命模式时，你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，且你无法行动，除非用于使用你的启动族裔专长、进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}、回忆知识，以及显现你的化身。

你的化身看起来是所选族裔的一员，但它不具有该族裔的任何能力。你可以通过你的化身行动，等同于有效获得该体型生物的全部能力；并且你的化身与你共享生命力与命运：你们是一个生物，且除非你选择通过进入无生命模式或取消显现化身来这样做，否则你不能被解除武装或以其他方式被分离。你的化身需要呼吸，并且若它持续保持显现，随着时间推移它最终也需要进食、饮水或睡眠，不过你可以通过取消显现来避免这些需求。在你的休息期间取消显现2小时，你可以提供魔法能量来帮助你的化身满足其每日进食、饮水与睡眠需求，因此这些需求只有在更短期的情况下才会造成妨碍（例如，如果天气足够炎热，或某个生物使用了特殊能力，你的化身可能需要立刻喝点什么，否则就有脱水风险）。

Whether it's an idealized form based on your self-conception or a ghostly echo of the form of the creature whose spirit and mind infused you and made you what you are, you can project an avatar to wield you and interact with the world around you. Choose a Small or Medium ancestry that can wield you. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.P9oh1it6jvt1it1U]{Project Avatar} action, which allows you to manifest or unmanifest your avatar in your space (or an adjacent space if you were already in a creature's space). When entering inanimate mode, you also automatically unmanifest your avatar, if it was manifested, and when exiting inanimate mode, you can form your avatar as part of the three-action activity. When you don't have an avatar, but you choose not to enter inanimate mode, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] and you can't act except to use your activation ancestry feats, to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, to Recall Knowledge, and to manifest your avatar.

Your avatar appears to be a member of the chosen ancestry, though it doesn't have any of the ancestry's abilities. You can act via your avatar, effectively gaining all the capabilities of a creature of that size, and your avatar shares your life force and fate; you are one creature, and you can't be Disarmed or otherwise separated unless you choose to do so by entering inanimate mode or unmanifesting your avatar. Your avatar needs to breathe, and it eventually needs to eat, drink, or sleep over time if it remains manifested, though you can unmanifest it to avoid any of these needs. While unmanifested for 2 hours during your rest period, you can provide magical energy to help your avatar meet its daily needs to eat, drink, and sleep, so these needs are only a hindrance if they occur on a shorter-term basis (for instance, if it's hot enough, or if a creature uses a special ability, your avatar might need to drink something right away or risk dehydration).

Doppelborn.name: 二重生灵 Doppelborn
Doppelborn.description:
无论你是变形怪或生具变形者的后代，还是由变形怪成分进化而来的克隆体，亦或是强大变形怪的身份盗窃魔法的受害者，或者你伪装了太多次以至于你变成了面具本身，你除了自身的其他族裔之外，也有一部分是变形怪。你获得生具变形者特质和变形怪特质，此外还保留你族裔所具有的特质。你的生具变形者变形能力让你能轻松将形体切换为各种人形生物的伪装。你进行模仿不需要伪装工具包。与完整的变形怪不同，你没有“偏好形态”。你可以在1分钟内@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{模仿}任何小型或中型的人形生物形态。当你以这种方式进行伪装时，你的模仿动作获得奥术和变化系特质。与普通变形怪的改变形态不同，它不会获得变形（特征），因为那会使你难以使用其他变形效果。你可以用单动作返回你的自然形态。

Whether you're the child of a doppelganger or doppelborn, a clone whose doppelganger components evolved, a victim of a powerful doppelganger's identity theft magic, or someone who took on so many disguises that you became the mask, you are part doppelganger, in addition to your other ancestry. You gain the doppelborn trait and the doppelganger trait in addition to the traits from your ancestry. Your doppelborn shapeshifting allows you to shift your form into various humanoid disguises with ease. You don't need a disguise kit to Impersonate. Unlike a full doppelganger, you don't have a "preferred form." You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} any Small or Medium humanoid form in 1 minute. When you disguise in this way, your Impersonate action gains the arcane and transmutation traits. Unlike normal doppelgangers' Change Shape, it doesn't gain the polymorph trait, as that would make it difficult to use other polymorph effects. You can return to your natural form with a single action.

Cait Sidhe.name: 凯特·希德 Cait Sidhe
Cait Sidhe.description:
你是一名凯特希德（cait sidhe），出身于一支能随意切换为猫形态的诡术师血脉。以一个具有专注、神秘、变形与变化系特征的单动作，你可以在类人形态与猫形态之间来回切换；猫形态为一种特定的超小型猫（通常为黑色），胸前有一块颜色截然不同的斑点（通常为白色）。处于猫形态时，你不能使用武器、盾牌或任何其他任何种类的手持物品，并且你在能进行哪些带有操作（特征）的动作方面受到限制。你唯一能进行的操作动作是施放带有姿势成分的法术，或诸如打开一扇未上锁的门之类的简单互动动作。你的猫形态不能执行需要手指或显著手部灵巧性的动作，包括任何需要通过检定才能完成的动作。GM 可能会判定其他操作动作也适用于你的猫形态。处于猫形态时你可以说话，且你唯一能进行的徒手攻击是下颚徒手攻击：造成 1d4 穿刺伤害，具有灵巧与娴熟特性，并且属于斗殴武器组。你可以无限期保持猫形态，直到你选择切换回来。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.NMh5sJCyc2LGa3C5]{效果: 猫形态}

You're a cait sidhe, from a line of tricksters who can switch to cat form at will. As a single action, which has the concentration, occult, polymorph, and transmutation traits, you can switch back and forth between your humanoid form and your cat form, a specific Tiny cat (typically black) with a spot of wildly different color on your chest (typically white). While in cat form, you can't use weapons, shields, or other held items of any sort, and you are limited in what actions you can take that have the manipulate trait. The only manipulate actions you can take are to Cast a Spell with somatic components or simple Interact actions such as opening an unlocked door. Your cat form can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish. The GM might determine other manipulate actions are appropriate for your cat form. While in cat form you can speak, and the only unarmed attacks you can make are jaws unarmed attacks that deal 1d4 piercing damage, have the agile and finesse traits, and are in the brawling weapon group. You can remain in cat form indefinitely until you choose to switch back.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.NMh5sJCyc2LGa3C5]{Effect: Cat Form}

Brimorak.name: 布里莫拉克 Brimorak
Brimorak.description:
你是一只 brimorak，一种由纵火之罪孽形成的恶魔，你能看穿各种烟雾。你的体型为小型。烟雾不会妨碍你的视力；如果一名生物仅因烟雾而处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} 状态，你在以其为目标所需的纯骰检定上自动成功。

You are a brimorak, a demon formed from the sin of arson, and you can see through all kinds of smoke. Your size is Small. Smoke doesn't impair your vision; you automatically succeed at the flat check to target a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} creature if that creature is concealed only by smoke.

Amphibious Slime.name: 两栖黏液怪 Amphibious Slime
Amphibious Slime.description:
你生活在一个同时具有水栖（特征）与陆地部分的环境中，并且已经习惯于在水中移动。你获得10英尺的游泳速度以及两栖（特征）。如同所有具有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你既能在水中呼吸，也能在空气中呼吸。

You lived in an environment with both aquatic and terrestrial sections, and you've grown accustomed to moving through water. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air.

Agile Slime.name: 敏捷黏液怪 Agile Slime
Agile Slime.description:
虽然黏液怪已经比其他一些软泥怪更快，但你的移动速度甚至比其他黏液怪还要迅捷。你的速度为25尺，而不是20尺。

While slimes are already faster than some other oozes, your movements are quick even compared to other slimes. Your Speed is 25 feet, instead of 20 feet.

Great Horned Minotaur.name: 巨角牛头人 Great Horned Minotaur
Great Horned Minotaur.description:
你的角和头部格外坚固而锋利，让你既能像穿刺一样轻松地打出钝击攻击。你的角徒手攻击在其其他特性之外，获得多用钝击特征。你获得角徒手攻击的大成功或大失败专精效果。若你已获得你角的大成功或大失败专精效果，则每当你对一名敌人造成重击时，你可以选择使用格斗武器组的大成功或大失败专精效果，或长矛武器组的大成功或大失败专精效果。你的体型为大型。

Your horns and head are especially sturdy and sharp, allowing you to deliver blunt attacks as easily as gore. Your horn unarmed attack gains the versatile bludgeoning trait, in addition to its other traits. You gain the critical specialization effect of your horn unarmed attack. If you would already gain your horn's critical specialization effect, you can choose each time you critically hit a foe whether to use the brawling group's critical specialization effect or the spear group's critical specialization effect. Your size is Large.

Archipelago.name: 群岛 Archipelago
Archipelago.description:
乍看之下，一串岛屿似乎不太可能成为地城，因为岛屿彼此分隔，而且每座岛都可以被设计为包含独立的挑战与奖励，但很快就会明白情况确实如此。你就是这样一条地城群岛链，因此，你的化身在水中更为有效。你获得10尺的游泳速度以及两栖（特征）。如同所有拥有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你既能呼吸水也能呼吸空气

While at first it might not seem like a chain of islands could be a dungeon, since islands are separated and each can be made to contain discrete challenges and rewards, it quickly becomes clear that this is indeed the case. You are one such dungeon island chain, and as such, your avatar is more effective in the water. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air

Earth Yai.name: 大地雅伊 Earth Yai
Earth Yai.description:
你是一名大地夜叉，一种恶鬼，其形态仿照石巨人，并通常力求提升你的力量与施加意志的能力。你的体型为大型，你关联的人形生物是石巨人，你的语言为巨人语。你获得大地与巨人（特征）特征。你无视由瓦砾与岩石造成的困难地形，而由瓦砾与岩石造成的强效困难地形对你而言仅为困难地形。你还获得用于瓦砾的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} 技能专长，即使你不满足该专长的先决条件。

You're an earth yai, an oni whose form is patterned after a stone giant who typically strives to increase your power and ability to exert your will. Your size is Large, your associated humanoid is stone giant, and your language is Jotun. You gain the earth and giant traits. You ignore difficult terrain from rubble and rock, and greater difficult terrain from rubble and rock is only difficult terrain for you. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat for rubble, even if you don't meet the feat's prerequisites.

Grimple.name: 格林普尔 Grimple
Grimple.description:
你是一只格林普尔，你发现由@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的手拿着恶心的物体非常适合用来做道具喜剧。你的体型为超小型。你可以随意将法师之手作为原始的先天法术施放。与常规一样，该戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半，向上取整。

You're a grimple, and you've learned that @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} hands carrying gross objects are perfect for prop comedy. Your size is Tiny. You can cast mage hand as a primal innate spell at will. As normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Venomproof.name: 抗毒 Venomproof
Venomproof.description:
你以及构成你头发的蛇已发展出对毒素的天生抗力，并对毒液具有极高的抗力，尤其是蛇毒。你获得等同于你等级一半（最低1）的毒素伤害抗力，并且你每次对毒素苦难进行的成功豁免会使其阶段降低2（若为剧毒毒素则降低1）。每次对持续中的毒素获得大成功或大失败中的大成功时，会使其阶段降低3（若为剧毒毒素则降低2）。你对蛇毒进行豁免时获得+1环境加值。

You and the snakes that make up your hair have developed a natural resistance to poison and are highly resistant to venom, especially snake venom. You gain resistance to poison damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), and each of your successful saving throws against a poison affliction reduces its stage by 2, or by 1 for a virulent poison. Each critical success against an ongoing poison reduces its stage by 3, or by 2 for a virulent poison. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against snake venom.
